title: Defiance Task Force
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:DefTF.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The surviving [[Azzameen family|Azzameens]] are escorted to the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']].]]
The '''Defiance Task Force''', sometimes known as '''Defiance Group''', was a task force of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nammo]]. It was named after Nammo's [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]], the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']].

==Description==
In addition to the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] ''Defiance'', the Defiance Task Force included the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] [[Valiant (MC40a light cruiser)|''Valiant'']], the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigates]] ''[[Jericho]]'' and ''[[Valiance]]'', the [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigate]] [[Spear (frigate)|''Spear'']], the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] [[Lance (CR90 corvette)|''Lance'']] and ''[[Masanya]]'', and the [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]]s ''[[Tuima]]'', ''[[ATS-0014]]'', ''[[ATS-0021]]'', ''[[ATS-0022]]'', ''[[ATS-0121]]'', ''[[ATS-0157]]'' and ''[[ATS-0416]]''.

==History==
The task force accompanied the ''Defiance'' throughout much of her operational history with the Rebellion, certainly between the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Shortly following the Alliance's infamous defeat at Hoth, the task force was trapped in the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]], with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Corrupter Task Force]] pursuing them.

After a brief campaign to weaken the Imperial influence in the sector, and their security measures, the task force was able to escape, thanks in part to the efforts of Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

After their escape, the task force was drastically reorganized. This new group joined up with the rest of the Rebel fleet at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], prior to the Battle of Endor. En route, however, the task force came under [[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|attack]] from an Imperial task group, comprising the [[Nexus (Carrack-class)|''Nexus'']], the [[Xerxes (Carrack-class)|''Xerxes'']] and the VSD ''[[Vagrant]]''. The ''Defiance''{{'s}} [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], along with escorts [[Olin Garn]] and Ace Azzameen, hindered the Imperial efforts to destroy the vessels, and the task force made it to Sullust. It is unknown what happened to the original Defiance Task Force, though the ''[[Jericho]]'' later served alongside the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
